conditional_items.role: Only enabled when the required visible anchor exists.

blocked_or_risky.role: Validation and exclusion metadata, not an item pool.

quality_gates: No candidate may require an unverified object in the image.
No candidate may be mainly a thin line, string, edge, trace, light effect, reflection, or tiny particle.
Default output candidates must be independently visible and circleable.
Risk examples must not be mapped into large, medium, small, or hanging.
